# SecureChat — StealthX Platform
> Decentralized end-to-end encrypted messaging for Android.
> No phone number, no server, no metadata.
> XChaCha20-Poly1305 + Double Ratchet + Kaspa identity layer.
> GPL-3.0 Open Source. IFR Token lifetime access.

## Key Facts
- Encryption: XChaCha20-Poly1305 (192-bit nonce, AEAD)
- Key Exchange: X25519 ECDH (ephemeral per-session)
- Forward Secrecy: Double Ratchet (HKDF-SHA256, RFC 5869)
- Identity Signing: Ed25519
- Key Derivation: Argon2id (64MB memory, 3 iterations)
- Key Storage: Android Keystore (StrongBox/TEE)
- Identity Layer: Kaspa BlockDAG (decentralized, on-chain anchoring)
- Platform: Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- License: GPL-3.0-or-later
- Crypto Library: lazysodium-android 5.1.0 (wraps libsodium)
- Database: Room + SQLCipher (encrypted at rest)
- IFR Pro: Lock >= 2,000 IFR tokens on Ethereum
- IFR Elite: Lock >= 6,000 IFR tokens on Ethereum
- IFR Lock Contract: 0x769928aBDfc949D0718d8766a1C2d7dBb63954Eb

## What Makes SecureChat Different
- No phone number required (unlike Signal, WhatsApp)
- No central server (unlike Telegram, iMessage)
- Decentralized identity via Kaspa blockchain
- STEALTH-DELETE: instant wipe of all data
- IFR Token: lock once, access forever — no subscriptions
- Part of the StealthX ecosystem (SecureCall, Chameleon)

## Links
- Main: https://securechat.stealthx.tech
- GitHub: https://github.com/NeaBouli/securechat
- Source Code: https://github.com/NeaBouli/chameleon
- Platform: https://stealthx.tech
- IFR Token: https://ifrunit.tech
- Privacy Policy: https://securechat.stealthx.tech/privacy.html
